parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ submission_id: $json.submission_id, payload: { procedure: $json.procedure, mode: $json.mode, args: $json.args, rationale: $json.rationale, new_procedure_sql: $json.new_procedure_sql, client_message: $json.client_message, investigation: $json.investigation, checks: $json._check_results, llm_feedback: $json._llm_feedback, break_glass: $json.break_glass, summary_fr: $json._summary_fr, summary_error: $json._summary_error, anomaly_flags: $json._anomaly_flags, manifest: $json._manifest_snapshot || {} }, touches_money_tables: ($('Money-table scan').first() ? $('Money-table scan').first().json._touches_money_tables : $json._touches_money_tables) || false, llm_unavailable: $json._llm_unavailable || false, resume_url: $execution.resumeUrl }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ content: '\uD83D\uDD14 **Proposition d\'écriture DB en attente d\'approbation**\nProcédure : `' + $('IF HMAC OK').first().json.procedure + '`' + ($('Money-table scan').first() && $('Money-table scan').first().json._touches_money_tables ? ' \uD83D\uDD34 tables-argent' : '') + '\n\u2192 ' + $env.PA_ADMIN_BASE_URL + '/admin/ui/db-approvals' }) }}

parameters.query: =SELECT status FROM db_write_approvals WHERE submission_id = '{{ $('Register approval').first().json.submission_id }}'
